overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character walking along an elevated industrial structure in a rainy, neon-lit Gotham City at night. The scene transitions from a covered metal walkway to an open rooftop with a full moon and Asian-inspired architecture visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial walkway with metal truss roofing

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the elevated industrial walkway under the metal roof structure

entered.detail: Industrial metal roofing structure with corrugated panels covering the walkway
Elevated metal platform with ridged surface texture
Red-painted structural steel beams running along the right side
Red and orange neon lighting visible through the rain in the distance
Tall smokestacks and industrial structures silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along an elevated industrial walkway covered by a metal truss roof. The environment is dark and rainy with red support girders visible on the right and distant neon lights glowing through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop terrace with full moon view and pagoda

events.description: exits covered structure into open moonlight, revealing the full moon and open sky
transition from enclosed industrial walkway to open-air rooftop with cityscape views

agents.ego_description: Batman continues walking forward as the roof ends and the environment opens up to reveal the moon and illuminated cityscape

entered.detail: Clear view of the night sky with heavy rain falling
Large bright full moon illuminating the scene through clouds
Multi-tiered pagoda structure with red neon lighting
Large illuminated advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The roof ends and Batman emerges onto an open rooftop terrace exposed to the rain. The full moon dominates the sky while an illuminated Asian pagoda and digital billboards become visible on the right, with the red support girders now receding into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered industrial corridor into an expansive, rain-swept rooftop overlooking the city. It begins with Batman walking along an elevated walkway beneath a metal truss roof, where red support girders frame a dark environment illuminated by distant neon lights through the downpour. As the camera advances, the overhead structure ends and the scene opens onto an exposed terrace, shifting the perspective from a confined tunnel to a wide urban vista. The view then expands to reveal a dominant full moon in the night sky and an illuminated Asian pagoda alongside digital billboards, while the red girders recede into the background.
